description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named GitHub Release that runs concurrently with cancel-in-progress behavior. Trigger on pull requests, push to trunk branch or tags matching v*, and workflow dispatch. The workflow should have a default bash shell and define a release job that builds a tarball on ubuntu-latest, installs tools, determines the last tag, generates a changelog, copies and tars the source code, and uploads the artifacts. A subsequent publish job depends on the release job, downloads the artifacts, and creates a GitHub release with the tarballs and changelog when a tag is pushed.
